tasks.subject: Task 1: Hub skeleton + Registry + lifecycle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SpectatorHub 클래스 + 모듈 레벨 SpectatorHubRegistry Map. ssh+tmux 소유, refcount, ssh.exit 시 destroy.

**Files:**
- Create: bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts
- Create: bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorSession.ts (SpectatorCallbacks에 paneUnavailable 추가)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- SpectatorHub class constructor injection
- Registry.subscribe first call spawns ssh, second reuses hub
- last close → destroy + ssh kill + controlPath unlink (no grace timer)
- ssh exit → all subs get exit callback
- SpectatorCallbacks.paneUnavailable added

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts", "bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts", "bridge/src/spectatorSession.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SpectatorHub class with constructor injection", "Registry.subscribe spawns ssh on first call", "second subscribe reuses hub", "last close → destroy + ssh kill + controlPath unlink", "ssh exit → all subs get exit callback + hub removed", "SpectatorCallbacks.paneUnavailable added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Hub state caching
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hub bootstrap + tmux 이벤트 핸들러로 상태 캐시 + Subscription fan-out 채널.

**Files:**
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- hub.bootstrap populates sessionId/windowId/activePaneId/paneStates
- currentWindowPaneOrder populated
- %window-pane-changed (debounce 100ms) → activePaneId + listener
- %session-window-changed → windowId + refresh order + listener
- %layout-change → refresh order
- %output → fan-out to listeners
- captureSeed + ensurePaneState methods

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts", "bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bootstrap populates state", "currentWindowPaneOrder populated", "%window-pane-changed (debounced) updates + fires listener", "%session-window-changed updates + refreshes + fires", "%layout-change refreshes order", "%output fans to listeners", "captureSeed + ensurePaneState exposed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SpectatorSubscription (follow-active)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Subscription이 hub 이벤트 listen + 자기 paneId 필터링. follow-active 디폴트. seed-during-output 큐잉.

**Files:**
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- default mode = follow-active
- subscribedPaneId tracks hub.activePaneId
- onPaneOutput filtered
- paneSwitch payload from hub state
- seed via captureSeed + reset+alt+content+cursor
- bytes during seed buffered + flushed in order
- subscription-level seeding (doesn't block other subs)
- attach() async

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts", "bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Subscription default = follow-active", "subscribedPaneId tracks hub.activePaneId", "onPaneOutput filtered", "paneSwitch payload populated", "seed sent as data after paneSwitch", "bytes during seed buffered + flushed", "other subs unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: SpectatorSubscription pin/unpin
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pinOrdinal(n) / unpin(). ordinal → paneId. window change 시 재해석. 무효면 paneUnavailable.

**Files:**
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- resolveOrdinal pure helper exported
- pinOrdinal valid → paneSwitch + seed
- pinOrdinal invalid → paneUnavailable
- unpin → follow-active + activePaneId seed
- pinned ignores onActivePaneChanged
- pinned re-resolves on onWindowPaneOrderChanged
- refreshPaneOrder change-detection before firing listeners

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts", "bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolveOrdinal pure helper", "pinOrdinal valid → paneSwitch + seed", "pinOrdinal invalid → paneUnavailable", "unpin → follow-active", "pinned ignores active change", "pinned re-resolves on window change", "insufficient panes → paneUnavailable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Hub desktop-mut methods
tasks.description:
**Goal:** hub.selectPane/tmuxNav/sendInput + Subscription 위임.

**Files:**
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- hub.sessionName field
- hub.selectPane resolves + select-pane
- hub.selectPane out-of-range → no-op
- hub.tmuxNav correct command per action
- hub.sendInput hex-encoded send-keys on activePaneId
- Subscription delegates + hasActivePane + controlPath getter

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts", "bridge/src/spectatorHub.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hub.selectPane via list-panes", "hub.tmuxNav correct command", "hub.sendInput hex send-keys", "Subscription delegation", "sub.controlPath getter"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: server.ts integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** handleWs → SpectatorHubRegistry, subscribe-pane 라우팅, imageTransfer controlPath via hub.

**Files:**
- Modify: bridge/src/server.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- type change to SpectatorSubscription
- connect spectate → Registry.subscribe + attach()
- subscribe-pane frame routes (0 unpin, ≥1 pin)
- data → sendInput, tmux-nav → tmuxNav/selectPane
- WS close → subscription.close()
- handleImageMessage uses hub.controlPath
- paneUnavailable → WS frame
- npm run build passes

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm test && npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/server.ts", "bridge/src/spectatorHub.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["handleWs uses SpectatorSubscription", "subscribe-pane → pin/unpin", "controlPath from hub", "paneUnavailable emits frame", "data/tmux-nav routed", "build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Client wsClient subscribePane + pane-unavailable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** wsClient.subscribePane(n) + pane-unavailable 메시지 핸들러 + onPaneUnavailable 콜백.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/terminal/wsClient.ts
- Create: app/tests/unit/editor/wsClientSubscribePane.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ClientOptions.onPaneUnavailable
- ServerMsg includes pane-unavailable + fields
- subscribePane(n) sends correct frame
- pane-unavailable dispatches with type check
- 4 vitest tests pass + npm check

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/wsClientSubscribePane.test.ts && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/terminal/wsClient.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/wsClientSubscribePane.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/wsClientSubscribePane.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["onPaneUnavailable callback option", "ServerMsg includes pane-unavailable", "subscribePane frame correct", "pane-unavailable dispatches with type check"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Client TerminalView cleanup + pinUnavailable banner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pinDetached/reattachIfPinned 흔적 모두 제거 + pinUnavailable + 노란 배너 + subscribePane 호출.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/terminal/TerminalView.svelte

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pinDetached + red banner + .banner-pin-detached removed
- reattachIfPinned + call sites removed
- WS open uses subscribePane
- pinUnavailable state + yellow banner
- onPaneUnavailable wired
- onPaneSwitch clears pinUnavailable
- onPaneNumClick uses subscribePane(N or 0)
- click/type calls selectPane directly
- 0 typecheck errors

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/terminal/TerminalView.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pinDetached + red banner removed", "reattachIfPinned + call sites removed", "WS open → subscribePane", "pinUnavailable + yellow banner", "onPaneUnavailable wired", "onPaneSwitch clears unavail", "onPaneNumClick uses subscribePane", "selectPane called directly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Delete old SpectatorSession + CLAUDE.md + regression
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SpectatorSession 클래스 삭제 + CLAUDE.md tomboy-terminal 갱신 + 전체 테스트 + 수동 회귀.

**Files:**
- Modify: bridge/src/spectatorSession.ts
- Modify: CLAUDE.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- SpectatorSession class + SpectatorOptions removed
- pure helpers + Callbacks preserved
- grep: 0 SpectatorSession references
- CLAUDE.md tomboy-terminal updated (multi-subscribe + pin live + ordinal-based + paneUnavailable)
- bridge file map adds spectatorHub.ts
- bridge tests pass
- app tests pass + 0 typecheck
- manual scenarios 1-8 pass

**Verify:** cd bridge && npm test && cd ../app && npm test && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/spectatorSession.ts", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test && cd ../app && npm test && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SpectatorSession removed", "helpers preserved", "no refs remain", "CLAUDE.md updated", "bridge tests pass", "app tests pass + 0 check", "manual scenarios 1-8 pass"]}
```
